case_title: RACHELLE RAMM VS. AUTO COMM GTW, LLC, A TEXAS LIMITED LIABILITY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMM, RACHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO COMM GTW, LLC, A TEXAS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY GLOBE TRACK WIRELESS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
